name: Encrypted Channel Activity
notes:
This rule detects encrypted channel.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious SSL Connection
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may employ a known encryption algorithm to conceal command and control traffic rather than relying on any inherent protections provided by a communication protocol.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%system.net.security.sslstream%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%net.security.remotecertificatevalidationcallback%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.authenticateasclient%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Encrypted Channel Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%system.net.security.sslstream%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%net.security.remotecertificatevalidationcallback%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.authenticateasclient%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
